mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_NICKNAME FROM TBL_MEMBER m JOIN TBL_PROJECT p ON m.ID = p.MEMBER_ID WHERE p.ID = #{projectId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_CHECKLIST WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} AND CHECKLIST_COMPLETED = 'Y'
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(cnt)), 0) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM TBL_CHECKLIST WHERE CHECKLIST_COMPLETED = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID )

SELECT CHECKLIST_TITLE AS CHECKLIST_TEXT, COUNT(*) AS CHECKLIST_COUNT FROM TBL_CHECKLIST WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} AND CHECKLIST_COMPLETED = 'Y' GROUP BY CHECKLIST_TITLE ORDER BY CHECKLIST_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(CAST(PROJECT_END_DATE AS DATE) - CAST(PROJECT_START_DATE AS DATE))), 0) FROM TBL_PROJECT WHERE PROJECT_START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND PROJECT_END_DATE IS NOT NULL
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(cnt)), 0) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM TBL_PROJECT GROUP BY MEMBER_ID )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) cnt FROM TBL_CHECKLIST WHERE CHECKLIST_COMPLETED = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) WHERE cnt > #{totalChecklists}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT MEMBER_ID) FROM TBL_CHECKLIST WHERE CHECKLIST_COMPLETED = 'Y'
